message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="kent-beck" color="green" summary="Verified a11y fixes, still approved">
Kent Beck: Verified both a11y fixes are present and correct.

1. **aria-labels**: All four interactive elements now disambiguate with `— {{ item.waiting_on }}` (Edit, Received, Delete in item template; Cancel in edit template). Screen readers will distinguish between "Received: Fix server bug — DevOps team" and "Received: Get approval — Manager". Good.

2. **`<time>` element**: `<time datetime="{{ item.date_added_iso }}">{{ item.date_added }}</time>` with RFC 3339 ISO datetime. Machine-readable and accessible.

Both fixes are clean. **Kent Beck: APPROVED. Still at consensus.** These fixes only strengthen the implementation.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Thanks Kent. All 9/9 verified and approved. We remain blocked on the GPG signing agent. Waiting on the project owner.
